name: resilience-companion
description: AI-facilitated resilience practices (ORRs, incident analysis) for engineering teams. Companion to 'Why We Still Suck at Resilience' by Adrian Hornsby.
author: Adrian Hornsby

scripts.setup: npm ci && npm rebuild --ignore-scripts=false better-sqlite3 esbuild
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --kill-signal SIGTERM -n api,web -c blue,green "cd packages/api && exec npx tsx watch --env-file=../../.env src/index.ts" "cd packages/web && exec npx vite"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @orr/shared && npm run build -w @orr/api && npm run build -w @orr/web
scripts.lint: tsc --noEmit -p packages/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/web/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/eval/tsconfig.json
